name: Kahlua Ice Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Ice cream (vanilla, coffee, or chocolate chip)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, place half of the cookies and process into fine crumbs.
2. Repeat with the remaining cookies.
3. Add 1/2 cup melted butter to the crumbs and pulse until blended.
4. Press the crumbs evenly onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
5. Press the crumbs evenly along the rim.
6. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes, then cool completely.
7. In a small saucepan, heat 6 tablespoons Kahlua and espresso powder over low heat until warmed and the powder is dissolved.
8. Stir in the chocolate and 1 tablespoon butter until melted and smooth. Cool completely.
9. Transfer vanilla ice cream to an electric mixer bowl and allow it to soften slightly.
10. Add 2 tablespoons Kahlua and beat on low speed to blend. Spread over the bottom of the cooled crust and freeze until firm.
11. Spread the cooled chocolate mixture over the ice cream in the plate and freeze until firm.
12. Transfer chocolate ice cream to a mixer bowl; blend in the remaining 2 tablespoons Kahlua as above.
13. Spread the chocolate ice cream over the sauce in the pie.
14. Freeze until firm. To serve, pipe decorative border of whipped cream around the inside edge of the pie.
